title: The Subjunctive Mood
description: Base form after formal verbs like INSIST, RECOMMEND, DEMAND, SUGGEST, PROPOSE.
summary_pt_br: Subjuntivo: depois de SUGGEST/DEMAND/INSIST + THAT + sujeito + verbo base. 'I suggest he BE careful.'

scenes.subtitle_en: Base form after formal verbs like INSIST, RECOMMEND, DEMAND, SUGGEST, PROPOSE.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Subjuntivo: depois de SUGGEST/DEMAND/INSIST + THAT + sujeito + verbo base. 'I suggest he BE careful.'

scenes.text_en: Base form after formal verbs like INSIST, RECOMMEND, DEMAND, SUGGEST, PROPOSE. Focus: the subjunctive mood. The committee recommended that the policy be revised.
scenes.text_pt: Subjuntivo: depois de SUGGEST/DEMAND/INSIST + THAT + sujeito + verbo base. 'I suggest he BE careful.' Foco: the subjunctive mood. O comitê recomendou que a política fosse revisada.

scenes.title: The Subjunctive Mood
scenes.body_en: After formal verbs of request/demand/suggestion + THAT + subject + BASE VERB: 'I suggest that he BE more careful.' Never 'is'. Also in fixed expressions: 'God save the queen', 'Long live...'
scenes.body_pt: Subjuntivo: depois de SUGGEST/DEMAND/INSIST + THAT + sujeito + verbo base. 'I suggest he BE careful.'

examples.en: The committee recommended that the policy be revised.
examples.pt: O comitê recomendou que a política fosse revisada.

examples.en: I insist that she attend the meeting tomorrow.
examples.pt: Insisto que ela compareça à reunião.

examples.en: It is essential that every voice be heard.
examples.pt: É essencial que toda voz seja ouvida.

exercise.question: Complete: "The committee ___ that the policy be revised."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The committee recommended that the policy be revised."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O comitê recomendou que a política fosse revisada.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
I insist that she attend the meeting tomorrow.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "I insist that she attend the meeting tomorrow."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Insisto que ela compareça à reunião.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: The Subjunctive Mood — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre the subjunctive mood. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Use the subjunctive: 'Someone must be careful.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I suggest that he be careful.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Now: 'The boss wants the report done today.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The boss demanded that the report be done today.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The committee proposes that new rules be adopted.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It is essential that every voice be heard.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Any subjunctive in your everyday speech?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Rarely — it sounds formal and academic.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: But indispensable in contracts and resolutions.

scenes.title: The board meeting
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the resolutions proposed. Use at least two subjunctive constructions.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the quarterly board meeting, the chairwoman read three formal resolutions into the record.

paragraphs.speaker: Chair
paragraphs.en: The board recommends that the current policy be revised before the end of the fiscal year.

paragraphs.speaker: Director
paragraphs.en: I insist that every department head attend the next strategy session in person.

paragraphs.speaker: Chair
paragraphs.en: It is essential that this decision be taken unanimously, not by a simple majority.

paragraphs.speaker: Legal
paragraphs.en: Motion carried. Let the record show that the resolution was adopted without objection.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Subjunctive mood in formal speech, Kumar later noted, survives precisely because no casual register can replace it.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "The Subjunctive Mood". Base form after formal verbs like INSIST, RECOMMEND, DEMAND, SUGGEST, PROPOSE. The committee recommended that the policy be revised. I insist that she attend the meeting tomorrow. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "The Subjunctive Mood". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "The Subjunctive Mood".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "The Subjunctive Mood".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: The Economist · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Jornalismo econômico e político sofisticado — nível C1+.

sources.pt_hint: Ensaios literários e jornalísticos — prosa rica.
